column2: Quilted All You Need Bag in Pink Pimlico Stripe
column3:
All You Need Convertible Bag has everything you want from its stylish silhouette to the water repellant fabric, to all its special details for your everyday needs. With a spacious interior, pockets that offer room for all of your belongings and baby's needs including diapers, bottles, blankets, toys, change of clothes.  This bag features a exterior pocket for ample storage, side slip pockets, padded and adjustable shoulder straps and top carry handles for ideal comfort and convenience for travel.

  • Size: 11"l x 10.5"h x 6.5"d
  • Custom Quilted Print
  • Lined in poly
  • Chunky White Zipper closure
  • Water and stain repellant & wipeable inside and out
  • Care: wipe with a clean damp cloth or machine wash cold, delicate and line dry
